sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92301" key="r(epte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥεπ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n92301.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must incline</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπί τι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:2:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
